lamb-crown-teleculinaria.name: Lamb Crown
instructions: Elimine cerca de 5 cm da gordura que se encontra na extremidade da costela de borrego. Corte depois entre os ossos, raspando um pouco a carne e o tecido.
Take a few blows to the membrane so the piece can be folded. Fold it with the meat facing outwards, put it vertically and tie it to the kitchen wire below the rib bones. Reserve.

Place the skinless ginger, olive oil, peeled garlic, parsley, salt and pepper in a tall glass. Crush everything very well with the magic wand and then mix with the grated bread. Brush the lamb crown with this sauce and let marinate for 1 hour.
Then transfer the crown to a board and place inside the garlic cut into slices. Take it in the oven, preheated at 200°C, for about 25 to 30 minutes. Remove from the oven and serve with grelos rice.

lamb-stew-with-butternut-squash.name: Lamb Stew With Butternut Squash
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Season lamb with salt.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Cook and stir 1/2 the lamb cubes in hot oil until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer browned meat with a slotted spoon to a plate, reserving drippings in the pot. Add remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the Dutch oven. Cook and stir second 1/2 the lamb cubes until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer lamb to plate. Reduce heat to medium-low.

Cook and stir onion, carrots, and garlic in Dutch oven until slightly softened, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir lamb cubes and any accumulated juices, tomatoes, beef stock, thyme, and rosemary into onion mixture and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off of the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Cover Dutch oven with an oven-proof lid.

Cook stew in the covered Dutch oven in the preheated oven until the lamb is tender, 2 to 3 hours. Stir butternut squash cubes into stew, recover the Dutch oven, and return to the preheated oven until squash is tender, 20 to 25 minutes.

lazy-dumplings-argiro.name: Lazy Dumplings
instructions: Add the sugar and water to a pot and mix to melt the sugar.

leftover-chapatti-tea-time-snacks.name: Leftover Chapatti Tea Time Snacks

ingredients.item: Fresh coriander leaves and curry leaf

instructions: In a bowl add gram flour, spices, oil, lemon juice, sugar, and salt. Mix well.
Slowly add water until the batter is thick but lump-free
Add coriander and green chilis and mix well.
Set up steamer pot over water
Arrange chapatti on a working surface. Work in batches ½ inch (1 ¼ cm) thick. Place one chappati over the next and repeat 3 times..
Make 2 rolls, each of which should have 3 chapati. Cover all sides of the roll with thick batter.
Put oil on the surface of the steamer and place the rolls in the steamer. Cook until it seems and you can remove a knife from the batter cleanly.
Remove the rolls from the steamer and allow to cool down completely. Cut the rolls into 1- inch (2 ½ cm) pieces.
Add 1 Tbsp oil to a  heated pan. Add 1 tsp mustard seeds, 2 chopped green chillies, fresh curry leaves, and salt to taste.
Add all the pieces of chapatti to the pan and stir over high heat until it crispy and coated with spices, about five minutes.
Serve hot with fresh onion thin flakes and green chutney.
RECIPE VARIATION
You can use Maize, millet flour, buckwheat flour, or sorghum flour in place of Gram flour. Make sure to add more or less water accordingly. You may also skip the frying step.

lemon-basil-strawberry-salad.name: Lemon Basil Strawberry Salad
instructions: Combine strawberries, sugar, and salt in a large bowl; set aside for 10 minutes.
Toss basil, balsamic vinegar, and lemon juice together in bowl until well combined; pour over strawberry mixture and toss to coat.

lemon-blondies-the-non-chocolate-version.name: Lemon Blondies (the Non-chocolate Version Of The Brownie)
lemon-blondies-the-non-chocolate-version.original_name: Blondies de limón (la versión sin chocolate del brownie)
instructions: We put the eggs with the sugar in a bowl and we beat with the rods till they whittle and increase their volume. We put the butter, the lemon frying, the lemon juice and salt and we mix well. Finally we add the steamed flour and we mix gently till it's all integrated.
Let's put into a square mold (we recommend those with removable Silicone as this model) we bake about 25 minutes at 180º C. When you notice that the edges are gilting, that's how they are.

A few minutes before we get them out of the oven, we have prepared the frying, and we have them mixed with the juice of two lemons with glas sugar with a stick or a fork. Let's add more sugar if we want more dense frying.
We get out of the oven and add the frying throughout the surface.
We let them cool and we clear and cut them into squares. Irresistibles these lemon blondies!

lemon-mini-pie-lezzet.name: Lemon Mini Pie
instructions: 1. Take all the necessary material for the pay base into a large mixing container.
2. Mix all materials until thoroughly miss.
3. Press the bottom of the small muffin dies that you lubricate the mortar light, and wait for 30 minutes in the freezer.
4. Cook the coconut milk and cream with the help of a mixer until the dish is joined.
5. Fill the filling cream into the clamping bag and tighten it on the base you remove from the freezer.
6. After resting half an hour in the refrigerator, serve by decorating with lime slices.

lentils-recipe-in-the-garden-comedera.name: Lentils Recipe In The Garden
lentils-recipe-in-the-garden-comedera.original_name: Receta de lentejas a la jardinera
instructions: Put the lentils in moist for 1 hour, then put them in a paddle and wash them a little.
Cut the onion, carrot and pimentons into small cubes.
Peel the potato and paddle it in cubes as well.
The garlic tooth pat and cut it very small.
En una olla grande pon aceite de oliva y cocina a fuego medio la cebolla, el ajo y los pimientos por un par de minutos. Remueve todo el tiempo para que no se queme ni se pegue.
Add abundant water to the pot, put the lentils, the bay, salt and pepper to taste and put up the fire to its best.
The ideal thing is that water cover lentils about 2 cm above.
At what's boiling, put the fire down in half and let them cook 20 minutes.
Al transcurrir este tiempo echa la papa picada.
Let them cook for another 20 minutes.
After this time, your lentils should be ready by now.
Al retirar del fuego ponle hojas de perejil fresco picado.
Sirve caliente y disfruta.

lettuce-salad-argiro.name: Lettuce Salad
instructions: We choose a large tender and crispy lettuce.
After washing it very well, let it drain very well and dry it on absorbent paper or on a salad centrifugal.
Classical lettuce salad is served with finely chopped lettuce and eaten immediately.
Add the chopped lettuce to a salad pot, add the fresh onions with their green leaves, the cucumber chopped with its peel and the chopped radish.
Add the chopped dill.
In a jar with lid, add the vinegar and salt.
Close tightly and beat the ingredients, shaking the jar until they become cream.
Pour the salad at the last minute just before serving and mix very well.
Add it to a salad pot and sprinkle with tender flowers and olives.
We serve right away.

light-caramel-frappe.name: Light Caramel Frappe
instructions: Combine ice, milk, coffee, 2 tablespoons caramel topping, vanilla extract, and sucralose sweetener in a blender. Pulse until ice is crushed to a smooth and thick consistency. Pour into a mug or tall glass; decorate with whipped topping. Drizzle 1 tablespoon caramel syrup on top.

light-wheat-rolls.name: Light Wheat Rolls
instructions: In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water. Let stand until creamy, about 10 minutes.

Mix sugar, salt, 1/4 cup melted butter, egg, and whole wheat flour into yeast mixture. Stir in all-purpose flour, 1/2 cup at a time, until dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl. Turn dough out onto a well floured surface, and knead until smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes. Lightly oil a large bowl, place dough in bowl, and turn to coat. Cover with a damp cloth, and let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.
Punch down dough, cover, and let rise in warm place until doubled again, about 30 minutes.

Grease 2 dozen muffin cups. Punch down dough, and divide into two equal portions. Roll each into a 6x14 inch rectangle, and cut rectangle into twelve 7x1 inch strips. Roll strips up into spirals, and place into muffin cups. Brush tops with melted butter. Let rise uncovered in a warm place 40 minutes, or until doubled in bulk.
Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from oven, and brush again with melted butter.

luscious-lemon-snowballs.name: Luscious Lemon Snowballs
instructions: Combine sugar and lemon zest in a food processor and pulse several times to bruise lemon zest. Transfer 1/2 cup sugar mixture to a bowl.

Beat butter and cream cheese in a mixing bowl until creamy and well-combined; mix in remaining lemon-sugar mixture, egg, lemon juice, and vanilla extract. Use an electric mixer to beat baking powder and salt into moist ingredients; gradually beat flour into mixture to make a dough. Freeze dough for 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet.

Shape dough into 1-inch balls and roll in reserved 1/2 cup lemon sugar. Place 2 inches apart on prepared baking sheet. Press cookies down slightly to flatten and sprinkle each cookie with about 1/8 teaspoon of the remaining lemon sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until cookies are firm on bottoms, 10 to 12 minutes.
